name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. Focus on the "why", not the "what". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see built. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Who benefits?

- [ ] End users (business owners using the bot)
- [ ] Developers / self-hosters
- [ ] Multi-tenant operators / agencies

## Complexity estimate

- [ ] Small (a few hours — config change, minor handler, UI tweak)
- [ ] Medium (a day or two — new job type, new platform integration)
- [ ] Large (a week+ — new AI provider, analytics system, scheduling engine)

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, links to prior art, anything else helpful -->
